results.title: Wipro expands ServiceNow tie-up on agentic AI workflows
results.description: The tie-up aims to cut manual handoffs and give enterprises clearer oversight of AI-driven tasks across IT, HR, procurement and security.

results.title: Why is market falling today? Sensex drops 600 points, Nifty below 23,400: 4 key factors
results.description: Indian equity markets erased early gains and slipped sharply into the red on Monday as escalating Iran-US tensions, rising crude oil prices, aggressive FII selling and higher US bond yields weighed on sentiment. While IT stocks outperformed and cushioned some losses, broader markets remained under pressure, with investors closely watching key technical support levels on the Nifty.

results.title: Why did market fall today? Sensex drops 500 points, Nifty closes below 23,400: 4 key factors
results.description: Indian stock markets experienced a sharp decline on Monday. The Sensex and Nifty both fell significantly. This downturn was driven by substantial foreign investor selling and growing concerns over the Iran-US conflict. Rising oil prices and increased market volatility also contributed to the negative sentiment. While IT stocks showed resilience, broader market indices and FMCG stocks faced losses.

results.title: 'Anushka Sharma is...': Virat fans get emotional after RCB wins
results.description: Once trolled for Virat Kohli's bad days, Anushka Sharma is now being celebrated as RCB's lucky charm. RCB beat Gujarat Titans in a one-sided final in Ahmedabad, with Virat top-scoring and winning Player of the Match. Fans flooded social media with love for Anushka after the victory.

results.description: The government had provided an eight-month window for beneficiaries to complete their e-KYC

results.title: Indian care worker wins lost wages after UK sponsor failed to provide work
results.description: An Indian care worker, Shabin Shaji, has won over £28,000 in lost wages and holiday pay after his sponsoring company, Swan Care Solutions Ltd, failed to provide him with work. The tribunal found Shaji was employed but prevented from working by the company, constituting an unauthorised deduction from his wages.
